title: PayReport
description: One crowdsourced real-pay data point. Aggregated at (canonicalRole x geo x remoteMode) grain by pay.crowd_aggregate / crowdAggregate, which DISPLAYS a stat only past the moat-safe density gates: >=5 distinct contributors, >=3 months span, and no single sourceType > 25% of reports. Until dense, the aggregate abstains and the UI falls back to posted pay or the OEWS band. Storage is F3 (SQLite -> Postgres); this is the record contract.

canonicalRole.description: normalized RCM role, e.g. 'denials analyst', 'medical biller' (maps to the scoring rubric's title vocabulary)

geo.description: US state or metro; 'US' for national-remote

sourceType.description: provenance; the >25% share gate stops any single source from dominating an aggregate

contributorId.description: pseudonymous; powers de-dup + the >=5-contributor gate. NOT PII.

reportedAt.description: for the >=3-month span gate and recency weighting

consent.description: explicit, revocable consent to aggregate. A report may be deleted on request (GDPR/CCPA); aggregates recompute.

_gates.rationale: antitrust/privacy-safe pay sharing needs density before display; below the gates the aggregate abstains rather than assert a thin, gameable number (mirrors the OEWS-prior abstain discipline from P0-D).
